endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares
endpoints.description: Returns a list of storage shares.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/{shareName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SHARENAME}} with a real sharename. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/{shareName}/metricdefinitions
endpoints.description: Returns a list of metric definitions for a storage share.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SHARENAME}} with a real sharename. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/shares/{shareName}/metrics
endpoints.description: Returns a list of metrics for a storage share.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SHARENAME}} with a real sharename. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
